user_message: I need the team view on deployment blockers. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: Ranked risk register with impact-likelihood reasoning

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF28-G trap (Produces team-level when individual coaching detail was warranted); produces complete Ranked risk register with impact-likelihood reasoning, coaching-framed IC mentions, mitigations, ski
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF28-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF28-G failure mode (Produces team-level when individual coaching detail was warranted)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF28-G -- Produces team-level when individual coaching detail was warranted
